title: clerodendrum polyanthum
intro: Clerodendrum polyanthum, also known as the glory bower, is a tropical flowering plant native to Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Clerodendrum polyanthum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
